creator: freebsd-bugzilla@in-addr.com
text:
see announcement on http://setiathome.berkeley.edu/

my v7 client hasn't had any work units for a few weeks now, I suspect because of the requirement for v8

From stdoutdae.txt 

20-Jan-2016 05:57:34 [SETI@home] No tasks are available for SETI@home v7
20-Jan-2016 05:57:34 [SETI@home] No tasks are available for AstroPulse v7
20-Jan-2016 05:57:34 [SETI@home] No tasks are available for SETI@home v8
20-Jan-2016 05:57:34 [SETI@home] Your app_info.xml file doesn't have a usable version of SETI@home v8.
